place: Taling Ngam, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Ridge-and-Saddle Hillside Land with 270° Sea Views - Taling Ngam
blurb: A rare 20,572 m² (12-3-43 rai) hillside landholding in one of Koh Samui's most exclusive, untouched corners — Taling Ngam, on the quiet southwest coast. A dramatic ridge-and-saddle topography divides naturally into elevated plots with uninterrupted panoramic views across the Gulf of Thailand. Eleven Chanote freehold deeds, single ownership.
detail:
Set within one of Koh Samui's most exclusive and untouched hillside locations on the quiet southwest coast at Taling Ngam, this is a rare opportunity to develop a collection of private luxury villas with uninterrupted panoramic sea views. Spanning 20,572 m² (12-3-43 rai) across eleven Chanote freehold title deeds held in single ownership, the land divides naturally into multiple elevated plots — each benefiting from privacy, orientation and dramatic topography.

The site is defined by a distinctive ridge-and-saddle formation that lends itself to layered, stepped architecture capturing expansive vistas across the Gulf toward Laem Sor, Koh Tan, the mainland and the west coast — with potential for near-270-degree panoramas from the prime plots and close to 360-degree views from the summit. Mature tropical vegetation and natural segmentation between plots give the holding a sense of seclusion rare on the island, while direct road access reaches every plot and established water infrastructure on site reduces development complexity and cost.

The land suits a low-density luxury masterplan — up to nine private villas, or a preferred configuration of three ultra-premium private estates, each with its own identity, scale and view orientation. It sits among prestigious neighbours including the Conrad Koh Samui, InterContinental and the Kamalaya wellness sanctuary, within an established, secure enclave — a foundation for a genuinely landmark hillside residence or boutique villa development. (All figures indicative and subject to verification and design development.)

features.l: Direct road access to all plots
Views to Laem Sor & Koh Tan
